notes.title: Welcome to Alan Vault
notes.content:
# Welcome to Alan Vault

This is your secure cloud platform. Here you can:

- Store files securely
- Create notes
- Manage tasks
- Save bookmarks

## Getting Started

1. Upload your first file
2. Create a new note
3. Add some tasks
4. Save important bookmarks

Enjoy your secure digital workspace!

notes.title: Project Ideas
notes.content:
# Project Ideas for Q3

## Web Development
- Build a portfolio website
- Create a React dashboard
- Develop a mobile app

## Learning Goals
- Learn TypeScript
- Master Node.js
- Study AI/ML basics

## Personal Projects
- Garden planning app
- Recipe organizer
- Fitness tracker

## Deadlines
- [ ] Complete research by end of month
- [ ] Start development next week
- [ ] Launch beta in 2 months
